ddls:
CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., concert, sports, theater) */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date of the event */,
  "venue" TEXT /* Venue of the event */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the venue */,
  "organizer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event organizer */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the event */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the event */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the event (e.g., planned, ongoing, completed, canceled) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the event */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the event image */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the event was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the event was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_organizer_id FOREIGN KEY ("organizer_id") REFERENCES event_organizers ("organizer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tickets" (
  "ticket_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ticket */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event the ticket belongs to */,
  "ticket_type" TEXT /* Type of ticket (e.g., adult, child, VIP) */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the ticket */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of tickets available */,
  "row" TEXT /* Row number of the ticket */,
  "seat_number" TEXT /* Seat number of the ticket */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the ticket (e.g., available, sold, reserved) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the ticket was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the ticket was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ticket_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the order */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event the order belongs to */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was made */,
  "total" REAL /* Total cost of the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, completed, canceled) */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Payment status of the order (e.g., unpaid, paid, refunded) */,
  "billing_address" TEXT /* Billing address for the order */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Shipping address for the order (if applicable) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the order was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the order was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order the item belongs to */,
  "ticket_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ticket the item belongs to */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of tickets purchased */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the ticket at the time of purchase */,
  "discount_amount" REAL /* Discount amount applied to the ticket */,
  "final_price" REAL /* Final price after applying discounts */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the order item was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the order item was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_ticket_id FOREIGN KEY ("ticket_id") REFERENCES tickets ("ticket_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user's account */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  "preferences" TEXT /* User preferences (e.g., preferred event types, communication preferences) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order the payment belongs to */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., credit card, PayPal) */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was made */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the payment */,
  "transaction_id" TEXT /* Unique transaction ID from the payment gateway */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency of the payment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the payment was made */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the payment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_payment_method FOREIGN KEY ("payment_method") REFERENCES payment_gateways ("gateway_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payment_gateways" (
  "gateway_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment gateway */,
  "gateway_name" TEXT /* Name of the payment gateway */,
  "gateway_api_key" TEXT /* API key for the payment gateway */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the payment gateway was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the payment gateway was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gateway_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_organizers" (
  "organizer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event organizer */,
  "organizer_name" TEXT /* Name of the event organizer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the event organizer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the event organizer */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company the organizer represents */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the event organizer was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the event organizer was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("organizer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "venues" (
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each venue */,
  "venue_name" TEXT /* Name of the venue */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the venue */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the venue */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the venue */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the venue */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the venue was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the venue was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("venue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the event type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the event type was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the event type was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ticket_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ticket type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the ticket type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the ticket type was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the ticket type was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders_archive" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the archived order */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the order */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event the order belongs to */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was made */,
  "total" REAL /* Total cost of the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the archived order */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Payment status of the archived order */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the order was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the order was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tickets_archive" (
  "ticket_id" INTEGER /* ID of the archived ticket */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event the ticket belongs to */,
  "ticket_type" TEXT /* Type of the ticket */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the ticket */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the ticket */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the archived ticket */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the ticket was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the ticket was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ticket_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_organizer_events" (
  "organizer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event organizer */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("organizer_id", "event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "venue_events" (
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the venue */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("venue_id", "event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ticket_type_events" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ticket type */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id", "event_id")
)
